1→package com.pinterest.ktlint.ruleset.standard
  2→
  3→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.Rule
  4→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION
  5→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION
  6→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.ANNOTATION_ENTRY
  7→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST
  8→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST
  9→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT
 10→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST
 11→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.VALUE_PARAMETER
 12→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.ElementType.WHITE_SPACE
 13→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.children
 14→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.firstChildLeafOrSelf
 15→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOf
 16→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isPartOfComment
 17→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpace
 18→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline
 19→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.lastChildLeafOrSelf
 20→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextCodeLeaf
 21→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.nextLeaf
 22→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.prevLeaf
 23→import com.pinterest.ktlint.core.ast.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe
 24→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.lang.ASTNode
 25→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.PsiWhiteSpace
 26→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.LeafPsiElement
 27→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.com.intellij.psi.impl.source.tree.PsiWhiteSpaceImpl
 28→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.descriptors.annotations.AnnotationUseSiteTarget
 29→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.KtAnnotationEntry
 30→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.leaves
 31→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.psi.psiUtil.siblings
 32→import org.jetbrains.kotlin.utils.addToStdlib.safeAs
 33→
 34→/**
 35→ * Ensures multiple annotations are not on the same line as the annotated declaration. Also ensures that annotations
 36→ * with parameters are placed on separate lines.
 37→ *
 38→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 39→ *
 40→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules. Moved since
 41→ */
 42→public class AnnotationRule : Rule("annotation") {
 43→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 44→        node: ASTNode,
 45→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 46→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 47→    ) {
 48→        when (node.elementType) {
 49→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
 50→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 51→            }
 52→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY ->
 53→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 54→        }
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
 58→        node: ASTNode,
 59→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 60→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 61→    ) {
 62→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
 63→
 64→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
 65→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER && // fun fn(@Ann("blah") a: String)
 66→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT && // fn(@Ann("blah") "42")
 67→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) && // val property: Map<@Ann("blah") String, Int>
 68→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
 69→        ) {
 70→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 71→        }
 72→
 73→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
 74→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct())
 75→        ) {
 76→            checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 77→        }
 78→
 79→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
 80→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() &&
 81→            node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
 82→        ) {
 83→            checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
 88→        node: ASTNode,
 89→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 90→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 91→    ) {
 92→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
 93→            emit(
 94→                node.startOffset,
 95→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
 96→                true,
 97→            )
 98→            if (autoCorrect) {
 99→                node
100→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
101→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
102→            }
103→        }
104→
105→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
106→            emit(
107→                node.startOffset,
108→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
109→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
110→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
111→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
112→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
113→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
114→            )
115→            if (autoCorrect) {
116→                node
117→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
118→                    .nextLeaf()
119→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
120→                    ?.let {
121→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
122→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
123→                        } else {
124→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
125→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
126→                            )
127→                        }
128→                    }
129→            }
130→        }
131→    }
132→
133→    private fun checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(
134→        node: ASTNode,
135→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
136→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
137→    ) {
138→        if (node.isLastAnnotationEntry()) {
139→            val noAnnotationWithParameters =
140→                node
141→                    .siblings(forward = false)
142→                    .none { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
143→            if (noAnnotationWithParameters) {
144→                emit(
145→                    node.treeParent.startOffset,
146→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
147→                    true,
148→                )
149→                if (autoCorrect) {
150→                    node
151→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
152→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
153→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
154→                }
155→            }
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    private fun checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
160→        node: ASTNode,
161→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
162→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
163→    ) {
164→        val isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList =
165→            node
166→                .siblings(forward = true)
167→                .any { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
168→        val isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine =
169→            node
170→                .siblings(forward = false)
171→                .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
172→        if (isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList || isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine) {
173→            emit(
174→                node.startOffset,
175→                "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
176→                true,
177→            )
178→            if (autoCorrect) {
179→                node
180→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
181→                    .nextLeaf()
182→                    ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
183→            }
184→        }
185→    }
186→
187→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() =
188→        getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
189→
190→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
191→        psi
192→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
193→            ?.useSiteTarget
194→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
195→
196→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() =
197→        getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
198→
199→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
200→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
201→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
202→
203→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
204→        treeParent
205→            .children()
206→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
207→            .let { it == this }
208→
209→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
210→        siblings(forward = false).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
211→
212→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
213→        siblings(forward = false)
214→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
215→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
216→
217→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
218→        siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
219→
220→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
221→        siblings(forward = true)
222→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
223→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
224→
225→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() =
226→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
227→            .leaves(forward = true)
228→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() }
229→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
230→
231→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
232→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
233→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
234→        } else {
235→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
236→        }
237→
238→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
239→        node: ASTNode,
240→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
241→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
242→    ) {
243→        node
244→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
245→            .nextCodeLeaf()
246→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
247→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
248→
249→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
250→                    emit(
251→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
252→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
253→                        true,
254→                    )
255→                    if (autoCorrect) {
256→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
257→                    }
258→                }
259→            }
260→    }
261→
262→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
263→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations = modifierListRoot.treeParent.treePrev as? PsiWhiteSpace
264→        // If there is no whitespace before the annotation, the annotation is the first
265→        // text in the file
266→        val newLineWithIndent = nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text ?: "\n"
267→        return if (newLineWithIndent.contains('\n')) {
268→            // Make sure we only insert a single newline
269→            newLineWithIndent.substring(newLineWithIndent.lastIndexOf('\n'))
270→        } else {
271→            newLineWithIndent
272→        }
273→    }
274→}

 34→/**
 35→ * Ensures multiple annotations are not on the same line as the annotated declaration. Also ensures that annotations
 36→ * with parameters are placed on separate lines.
 37→ *
 38→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 39→ *
 40→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules. Moved since
 41→ */
 42→public class AnnotationRule : Rule("annotation") {
 43→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 44→        node: ASTNode,
 45→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 46→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 47→    ) {
 48→        when (node.elementType) {
 49→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
 50→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 51→            }
 52→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY ->
 53→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 54→        }
 55→    }
 56→
 57→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
 58→        node: ASTNode,
 59→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 60→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 61→    ) {
 62→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
 63→
 64→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
 65→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER && // fun fn(@Ann("blah") a: String)
 66→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT && // fn(@Ann("blah") "42")
 67→            !node.isPartOf(TYPE_ARGUMENT_LIST) && // val property: Map<@Ann("blah") String, Int>
 68→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
 69→        ) {
 70→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 71→        }
 72→
 73→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
 74→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct())
 75→        ) {
 76→            checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 77→        }
 78→
 79→        if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
 80→            node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() &&
 81→            node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
 82→        ) {
 83→            checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(node, emit, autoCorrect)
 84→        }
 85→    }
 86→
 87→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
 88→        node: ASTNode,
 89→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 90→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 91→    ) {
 92→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
 93→            emit(
 94→                node.startOffset,
 95→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
 96→                true,
 97→            )
 98→            if (autoCorrect) {
 99→                node
100→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
101→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
102→            }
103→        }
104→
105→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
106→            emit(
107→                node.startOffset,
108→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
109→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
110→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
111→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
112→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
113→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
114→            )
115→            if (autoCorrect) {
116→                node
117→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
118→                    .nextLeaf()
119→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
120→                    ?.let {
121→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
122→                            it.replaceWithText(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
123→                        } else {
124→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
125→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
126→                            )
127→                        }
128→                    }
129→            }
130→        }
131→    }
132→
133→    private fun checkForMultipleAnnotationsOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(
134→        node: ASTNode,
135→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
136→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
137→    ) {
138→        if (node.isLastAnnotationEntry()) {
139→            val noAnnotationWithParameters =
140→                node
141→                    .siblings(forward = false)
142→                    .none { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
143→            if (noAnnotationWithParameters) {
144→                emit(
145→                    node.treeParent.startOffset,
146→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
147→                    true,
148→                )
149→                if (autoCorrect) {
150→                    node
151→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
152→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
153→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
154→                }
155→            }
156→        }
157→    }
158→
159→    private fun checkForAnnotationToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
160→        node: ASTNode,
161→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
162→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
163→    ) {
164→        val isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList =
165→            node
166→                .siblings(forward = true)
167→                .any { it.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() }
168→        val isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine =
169→            node
170→                .siblings(forward = false)
171→                .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
172→        if (isFollowedWithAnnotationHavingValueArgumentList || isPrecededWithAnnotationOnOtherLine) {
173→            emit(
174→                node.startOffset,
175→                "Annotation must be placed on separate line",
176→                true,
177→            )
178→            if (autoCorrect) {
179→                node
180→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
181→                    .nextLeaf()
182→                    ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
183→            }
184→        }
185→    }
186→
187→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() =
188→        getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
189→
190→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
191→        psi
192→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
193→            ?.useSiteTarget
194→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
195→
196→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() =
197→        getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
198→
199→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
200→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
201→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
202→
203→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
204→        treeParent
205→            .children()
206→            .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
207→            .let { it == this }
208→
209→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
210→        siblings(forward = false).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
211→
212→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
213→        siblings(forward = false)
214→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
215→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
216→
217→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
218→        siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
219→
220→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
221→        siblings(forward = true)
222→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
223→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
224→
225→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() =
226→        lastChildLeafOrSelf()
227→            .leaves(forward = true)
228→            .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() || it.isPartOfComment() }
229→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
230→
231→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
232→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
233→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
234→        } else {
235→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
236→        }
237→
238→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
239→        node: ASTNode,
240→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
241→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
242→    ) {
243→        node
244→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
245→            .nextCodeLeaf()
246→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
247→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
248→
249→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
250→                    emit(
251→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
252→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
253→                        true,
254→                    )
255→                    if (autoCorrect) {
256→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
257→                    }
258→                }
259→            }
260→    }
261→
262→    private fun getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
263→        val nodeBeforeAnnotations = modifierListRoot.treeParent.treePrev as? PsiWhiteSpace
264→        // If there is no whitespace before the annotation, the annotation is the first
265→        // text in the file
266→        val newLineWithIndent = nodeBeforeAnnotations?.text ?: "\n"
267→        return if (newLineWithIndent.contains('\n')) {
268→            // Make sure we only insert a single newline
269→            newLineWithIndent.substring(newLineWithIndent.lastIndexOf('\n'))
270→        } else {
271→            newLineWithIndent
272→        }
273→    }
274→}
